title: commerce.update_order_status@1.0.0 args — DEPRECATED in 0.2.0, removed in 0.3.0

order_id.description: Resolvable fact (§6.3). Aliases: orderId, order_number, reference_id.

status.description: DEPRECATED. Calibration (18 platforms; 17/18) showed order status is a DERIVED fact, not a settable field (GAP-001). Use commerce.record_fulfillment / commerce.record_payment.

$comment: DEPRECATED 0.2.0 with one-MINOR overlap (VERSIONING). The reference implementation (wosool-cloud) emits an EVENT deprecation warning when this verb is used. Removed in 0.3.0. Replacement: record_fulfillment (fulfillment axis) + record_payment (financial axis).
